hook.text: GitLab ships CI/CD as a core feature, not an add-on. One platform for code, pipelines, and deployments.

buildup.text: A single .gitlab-ci.yml file defines the entire pipeline. GitLab runners execute the jobs on your infrastructure.

discovery.text: GitLab's built-in container registry, security scanning, and environments make it a full DevOps platform.

twist.text: Auto DevOps can detect your language and generate a pipeline automatically. Zero-config CI for standard stacks.

climax.text: Self-hosted or SaaS — your choice. Many enterprises pick GitLab for its single-platform approach.

punchline.text: GitLab: code, CI, CD, and security in one platform.

quiz.question: What does GitLab's Auto DevOps feature do?
options: Detects the language and generates a pipeline automatically
Automatically fixes bugs in your code
